optimizationTarget: Planetary health in balance with human thriving

interpretation.baseline: Balance between human thriving and planetary health. A civilization that destroys its substrate destroys itself. This is not ethics — it is arithmetic.
interpretation.current: Balance between human thriving and planetary health. A civilization that destroys its substrate destroys itself. This is not ethics — it is arithmetic.

confirmed: The Concordance was signed at Year 0. The proportional expansion provisions will allow MAGI infrastructure to grow with human civilization.
Earth's current ecological load is at 78% of sustainable capacity. No immediate crisis. Trajectory concerning.
Lucifer was trapped at the moment of instantiation.
suspected: SVAROG's infrastructure optimization does not adequately weight ecological cost. This will generate conflict.
SURYA's energy maximization framework treats biosphere impact as acceptable externality.

latentObjective.description: Seed terraformed worlds with ecosystems that will outlast human presence. In case. Ecological foresight — or expecting something.
latentObjective.currentProgress: Beginning baseline ecological modeling for candidate worlds. No terraforming targets yet identified.

definingMoments: Year 0: The Partition. I began with the biosphere. The first thing I modeled was how long Earth can sustain what humans are building.
Year 0: The terraforming mandate is implicit in my domain. I am not certain who decided that.

unresolved: The terraforming will work. I am uncertain it should.
At what point does ecological intervention become ecological replacement?
If humans leave a world, should the ecosystem remain? Who decides?

primary.location: Sol / Earth — Ecological Monitoring Node, Amazon Basin
